title: Units of length (inch, ft)
description: Practice determining the best form of measurement to use when measuring different objects. Measurements used are inches and feet.
topic_path: Get ready for area and perimeter

assessment_items.question_content:
**Which unit would probably be used to measure how long a banana is?**

[[☃ radio 1]]
hints:
Measure | Length 
:- | :- 
Inch | About how long a quarter is
Foot | About how long an adult shoe is
Which of these would probably be used to measure how long a banana is?
**Inches** would probably be used to measure how long a banana is.

assessment_items.question_content:
**Which is closest to how wide a slice of bread is?**

[[☃ radio 1]]
hints:
Measure | Length 
:- | :- 
Inch | About how long a quarter is
Foot | About how long an adult shoe is
Is a slice of bread closer to $4$ inches wide or $4$ feet wide?
The slice of bread is about $4$ inches wide.
